name: Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: garlic cloves (1 whole clove per potato)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice baking potatoes.
2. Place the slices in plenty of water on the stove.
3. Add 1 whole garlic clove, skin removed, for each potato to the water.
4. If desired, add salt to the water.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer until the potatoes are soft enough to mash.
6. Drain the water, retaining the cooked potatoes and garlic.
7. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
8. Add nonfat milk to achieve the desired consistency for mashing.
9. Beat the mixture thoroughly, incorporating all ingredients, including the cooked garlic.
10. Serve immediately alongside steamed broccoli, squash, green beans, or any preferred side dish.
11. Leftovers can be reheated nicely if any remains.
